title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIM Bangalore

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIM Bangalore
jsonLd.description:
IIM Bangalore, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Bangalore:
IIM Bangalore is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Bangalore!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
